parameters.name: huerange
parameters.label: Hue Range
parameters.description: This is the range of color from the Start Color that will be adjusted. A range of 1 will only adjust the colors that are the same as the start color. A range of 360 will adjust all colors. For example

parameters.name: huefalloff
parameters.label: Hue Falloff
parameters.description: This controls the falloff from the Hue Range. Higher values give more falloff, blending the hue range softly from hues that are adjusted to hues that are not.

parameters.name: saturationrange
parameters.label: Saturation Range
parameters.description: This is the range of saturation to adjust from the saturation of the Start Color. The Range is from 0 to 1.

parameters.name: saturationfalloff
parameters.label: Saturation Falloff
parameters.description: This controls the falloff from the Saturation Range selected.

parameters.name: valuerange
parameters.label: Value Range
parameters.description: This is the range of value to adjust from the value of the Start Color. The Range is from 0 to 1.

parameters.name: valuefalloff
parameters.label: Value Falloff
parameters.description: This controls the falloff from the Value Range selected.

parameters.name: hueoffset
parameters.label: Hue Offset
parameters.description: Adjust the hues selected above. The Hue Offset ranges from 0 to 360. For example, if the initial pixel color is 180 then a Hue Offset of 100 will change the hue  of 180 (cyan) to be a hue of 280 (viol

parameters.name: saturationmult
parameters.label: Saturation Multiplier
parameters.description: Adjusts the saturations selected above. This will multiply the saturation values specified by Saturation Range and Falloff parameters above. Setting this to 0 will reduce the selected saturation to 0,

parameters.name: valuemult
parameters.label: Value Multiplier
parameters.description: Adjusts the values selected above. This will multiply the values specified by Value Range and Falloff parameters above.

parameters.name: startcolorb
parameters.label: Startcolorb
parameters.description: The start color is the hue that the HSV adjustment is centered around. When adjusting a small hue range, this is the color that will be altered. In the example image above, the Start Color color is cy
